base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of lynel_walk_shoot — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Lynel — centaur-knight with sword. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Lynel — centaur-knight with sword; 4-dir walk + shoots sword-beam projectile. Strongest overworld enemy, found on Death Mountain paths
